title: IndiGrid is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IndiGrid is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? IndiGrid in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiGrid:
IndiGrid is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiGrid!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
